docket_entries.description: ORDER CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY EARLE, JOHN STEWART, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO DEC-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY EARLE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-14-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN EARLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE THAT HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-30-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROMINA ORIBELLO, REGIONAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT STEWART, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-30-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEWART, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM CURTIS SMOLAR. PLAINTIFF JOHN EARLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROMINA ORIBELLO, REGIONAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EARLE, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEWART, JOHN NO EVIDENCE OF DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGE REPORT PRE-DATED THE INCIDENT BY APPROXIMATELY ONE MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
